name: gaming-music-bot
description: A Discord bot that plays music

scripts.build-prod: npm run build && npm run docker-build && npm run docker-save
scripts.branch-guard: git branch --show-current | grep -qx master || (echo 'Must be on master branch' && exit 1)
scripts.release:patch: npm run branch-guard && npm version patch && git push --follow-tags --atomic origin HEAD
scripts.release:minor: npm run branch-guard && npm version minor && git push --follow-tags --atomic origin HEAD
scripts.release:major: npm run branch-guard && npm version major && git push --follow-tags --atomic origin HEAD
